description: Catalogue de films argentiques et leurs caractéristiques exploitables dans le prompt Gemini et le post-process G'MIC.

kodak_portra_400.color_bias: peau chaude et neutre, verts doux, rouges désaturés
kodak_portra_400.prompt_tokens: Kodak Portra 400, fine creamy grain, warm neutral skin tones, soft contrast, wide dynamic range

kodak_portra_160.prompt_tokens: Kodak Portra 160, ultra fine grain, pastel palette, creamy skin tones, soft editorial contrast

fujifilm_pro_400h.color_bias: verts et cyans naturels, peau légèrement rosée
fujifilm_pro_400h.prompt_tokens: Fujifilm Pro 400H, fine neutral grain, natural greens and cyans, soft contrast, airy feel

kodak_gold_200.color_bias: jaunes dorés, rouges saturés, ambiance nostalgique
kodak_gold_200.prompt_tokens: Kodak Gold 200, warm golden grain, saturated reds and yellows, vintage 90s summer look

cinestill_800t.color_bias: bleus cyan forts, halos rouges autour des lumières (halation)
cinestill_800t.usage_typique: scènes nocturnes, néons urbains, ambiance cinématique
cinestill_800t.prompt_tokens: CineStill 800T, visible tungsten grain, red halation around light sources, cyan shadows, cinematic night look

ilford_hp5.usage_typique: reportage noir et blanc, street, documentaire
ilford_hp5.prompt_tokens: Ilford HP5 Plus black and white, visible silver grain, high contrast, documentary reportage feel

fujifilm_velvia_50.color_bias: saturation élevée, verts profonds, bleus intenses
fujifilm_velvia_50.prompt_tokens: Fujifilm Velvia 50, fine grain, saturated greens and blues, high contrast landscape look

polaroid_600.prompt_tokens: Polaroid 600 instant film, chemical texture, washed cyan-green cast, soft pastel contrast, vintage intimate feel
